calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73275213 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73275213 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data | rg 'scotus/73275213|73275213'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find . -path '*73275213*' -o -path '*/record/*' | sort | sed -n '1,240p'; find . -name context.json -o -name documents.json -o -name questions-presented.txt | sort | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73275213/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,400p' data/cases/scotus/73275213/record/snapshots/2026-07-13.json && sed -n '1,200p' data/cases/scotus/73275213/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l data/cases/scotus/73275213/record/snapshots/2026-07-13.json; sed -n '401,900p' data/cases/scotus/73275213/record/snapshots/2026-07-13.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*case|citation/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); matches.forEach(x => text(x.name+" — "+x.description));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help; rg -n -A140 -B5 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|Term|fee' metrics/statpack.md | sed -n '1,360p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Milligan v. Allen",court:["alnd"],filed_before:"2025-09-10",order_by:"dateFiled desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Milligan Alabama congressional redistricting",court:["alnd"],filed_before:"2025-09-10",order_by:"dateFiled desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Evan Milligan\" congressional redistricting Alabama",filed_before:"2025-09-10",order_by:"dateFiled desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"clusters",item_id:10049679,fields:["case_name","date_filed","citations","syllabus","precedential_status","docket"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",citation:"599 U.S. 1",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","cluster_id","opinions","absolute_url"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"vacated|remanded|GVR|granted-in-part|petition-disposition\" src tests docs | sed -n '1,260p'; find data/cases/scotus/73275213/record -maxdepth 2 -type f -print","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,70p' docs/data-pipeline.md; sed -n '150,195p' tests/test_ingest.py; sed -n '1,90p' src/fedcourtsai/pipeline/cert_signals.py; sed -n '1000,1045p' src/fedcourtsai/corpus.py","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; find data/cases/scotus/73275213/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 4 -print | sort; git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data; git status --short; find data/cases/scotus/73275213/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260713T130811Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch

       "category": "data-quality",

       "message": "The July 13, 2026 snapshot contains a final disposition, while event.yaml still has resolved=false and record/context.json labels the cell forward. The snapshot cutoff and event state should be reconciled.",

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data && git status --short --untracked-files=all | rg '73275213'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
